text: Assess a payment default or recovery dispute in full. Identify the parties, the underlying transaction or arrangement, the amount involved, payment obligations, default or non-payment events, performance issues, notice-related issues, likely legal and contractual grounds, possible defenses, compliance concerns, recovery options, settlement leverage, expected outcome, likely recovery timeline, and what facts or missing information weaken the case. Clearly separate what is supported from what is uncertain or missing. Also state what would be needed before issuing notice, starting recovery proceedings, or preparing a draft.
